description: Detects C# Thread.Sleep() calls which block the current thread. Simplified from Rust: flags all invocation_expression nodes. Cannot filter by Thread.Sleep specifically (vs other invocations), skip Sleep(0)/Sleep(1) yield idioms, or detect async context for severity graduation. Higher false positive rate.

flag.message: Method invocation detected -- if this is Thread.Sleep(), use Task.Delay() with async/await instead to avoid blocking the current thread.
